description: Clean up the Zotero library by deleting specific obsolete tags while preserving meaningful topic tags. Delete the following six tags: 'imported', 'to-read-maybe', 'uncategorized', 'DUPLICATE', '_temp', and 'needs-review'. Ensure that the tags 'deep-learning', 'computer-science', 'information-theory', 'physics', and 'NLP' are preserved. Do not delete any library items (papers), only the specified tags.
